vulnerability.reference: Users trust retrieval results without verifying visual relevance, amplifying the impact of text-biased hash codes.
vulnerability.generated: The unsupervised hashing model lacks visual discriminative constraints, so it conflates textual similarity with visual similarity.

impact.reference: Users receive misleading image results, leading to incorrect decisions in e-commerce, news verification, or research.
impact.generated: Users retrieve visually irrelevant images that match the text, wasting time and degrading search experience.

dose_response.reference: External textual guidance biasing hash codes toward text semantics causes retrieval to reflect textual relevance, exposing users who trust results without verification to misleading images, leading to incorrect decisions in e-commerce, news, or research.
dose_response.generated: External textual guidance biases hash codes toward text semantics; through natural-language image queries, this triggers the model’s lack of visual constraints, conflating textual and visual similarity, leading to retrieval of visually irrelevant images wasting time and degrading search.
